dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8088 IH: Growing Deposit Insurance for the Future Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Meuser introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Deposit Insurance Act to update the inflation adjustment applicable to deposit insurance and share insurance.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Growing Deposit Insurance for the Future Act.
Section 11(a)(1)(F)(i) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act (12 U.S.C. 1821(a)(1)(F)(i)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subclause (I), by striking $100,000 and inserting the standard maximum deposit insurance amount described in subparagraph (E), before any adjustment as provided under this subparagraph; and

in subclause (II), by striking the date this subparagraph takes effect under the Federal Deposit Insurance Reform Act of 2005 and inserting the date of enactment of the Growing Deposit Insurance for the Future Act.
